title: [lichen_l2.c:114] MAX_LORA_FRAME hardcoded 255 should use LICHEN_LORA_MAX_PHY_PAYLOAD
description:
Completeness: Constant coupling category.

At line 114:


But lora_l2.h:73 defines:


These are the same value but defined separately. If LICHEN_LORA_MAX_PHY_PAYLOAD ever changed (e.g., for a different radio type), MAX_LORA_FRAME would drift.

MAX_LORA_FRAME is used at:
- Line 264: tx_frame_buf[MAX_LORA_FRAME]
- Line 1497-1499: len validation

LICHEN_LORA_MAX_PHY_PAYLOAD is used at:
- lora_l2.c:187: tx_buf sizing
- lora_l2.c:319: rx_buf sizing
- lora_l2.c:814: len validation

Fix: In lichen_l2.c, #include lora_l2.h (already included at line 13) and use LICHEN_LORA_MAX_PHY_PAYLOAD instead of MAX_LORA_FRAME, or add BUILD_ASSERT(MAX_LORA_FRAME == LICHEN_LORA_MAX_PHY_PAYLOAD).
close_reason: Fixed: Added BUILD_ASSERT to validate MAX_LORA_FRAME equals LICHEN_LORA_MAX_PHY_PAYLOAD
